cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to analyze this ethical dilemma about whether to leave a high-paying job for a less lucrative passion project. Let me start by breaking down the problem. The person has saved money, so they can afford to take some time off or maybe even transition. But the question is whether abandoning financial stability for personal fulfillment is the right choice.
